name: st
description: Structured Text — IEC 61131-3 PLC programming tools (CODESYS, OpenPLC, matiec)

subcommands.name: compile
subcommands.description: Compile Structured Text to PLC bytecode

subcommands.name: simulate
subcommands.description: Run PLC simulation with Structured Text program

subcommands.name: download
subcommands.description: Download compiled program to PLC controller

subcommands.name: generate
subcommands.description: Generate C code from Structured Text using matiec
